title: pulsatilla vulgaris subsp. grandis
intro: Pulsatilla vulgaris subsp. grandis, also known as the large pasque flower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to ease menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. Pulsatilla vulgaris subsp. grandis can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusible herb for its medicinal uses.
